# Figma Task Runtime Boundaries

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerruntimeresponsibilitydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to runtime responsibility](../runtime-responsibility.md)

Figma task UI state is upstream context, not a provider runtime interpretation surface.

- Task thread selection, annotation parsing, dropdowns, and participant projection are control-plane/client concerns.
- The runtime consumes only structured assignment input and command signals such as cancel or interrupt.
- Telemetry markers may pass through as metadata, but they must not change execution authority.

A provider adapter must never infer target policy or workspace authority from UI-only labels.
